nasb.text: And Jesus stopped and commanded that he be brought to Him; and when he came near, He questioned him,

esv.text: And Jesus stopped and commanded him to be brought to him. And when he came near, he asked him,

cnv.text: 耶穌站住，吩咐領他過來。等他走近，就問他：

ccb.text: 耶稣停下脚步，命人把他带过来，然后问他：

csbs.text: 耶稣就停住，吩咐把他带到他面前来；那人走近了，耶稣就问他：
